# Startup Security Guide & LLM CISO Persona

> Startup security guide, compliance checklist, and LLM-based virtual CISO. Evolution: SKIL → MCP → self-correction → Slack/Telegram collaboration. Dual-language (KR / EN).

## Roadmap (canonical)

- [ROADMAP.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/ROADMAP.md): Phase 3+ roadmap — SKIL, MCP, self-correction, bots.
- [ROADMAP_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/ROADMAP_EN.md): English roadmap summary.

## SKIL & Skills (M0)

- [skil/](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/tree/main/Startup_Security_Guide/skil): Structured controls/policies/playbooks. Query: `node query.mjs control:aws-iam-mfa`
- [skills/](https://github.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/tree/main/Startup_Security_Guide/skills): Cursor `SKILL.md` + portable `SYSTEM_PROMPT.md` for Claude/ChatGPT/Ollama
- [skills/README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/skills/README.md): Multi-LLM usage guide

## English Documents

- [README_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/README_EN.md): Project overview. Tving/CU/FastCampus motivation. SKIL→MCP→correction→bots roadmap. Tech stack.
- [STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_EN.md): Full security guide. GDPR vs CCPA vs PIPA. Stage-gated checklist. Cloud/GWS/DRM/KISA/IR. SKIL Controls/Playbooks source.
- [LLM_CISO_PROMPT_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/LLM_CISO_PROMPT_EN.md): Virtual CISO persona. Domain prompts. Ollama Modelfile. TS snippets. SKIL source for personas and findings schema.
- [LLM_CISO_DASHBOARD_EN.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/LLM_CISO_DASHBOARD_EN.md): Dashboard (Phase 3 M3). Depends on M0 SKIL + M1 MCP. Correction views, bots/RBAC (M4).

## Korean Documents (한국어)

- [README.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/README.md): 프로젝트 개요. SKIL→MCP→자기교정→봇 로드맵.
- [STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_KR.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/STARTUP_SECURITY_GUIDE_KR.md): 스타트업 정보보호 가이드. SKIL Controls/Playbooks 원천.
- [LLM_CISO_PROMPT_KR.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/LLM_CISO_PROMPT_KR.md): CISO 페르소나·프롬프트. SKIL 원천.
- [LLM_CISO_DASHBOARD.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/gameworkerkim/CYBER-THREAT-INTELLIGENCE-REPORT/main/Startup_Security_Guide/LLM_CISO_DASHBOARD.md): 대시보드 기획 (M3). MCP 검증 API, 교정·팀 공유.

## Key Topics

- SKIL: structured controls, policies, playbooks, findings schema for MCP/Skills
- MCP: skil_lookup, gitleaks, trivy, prowler; validate_assessment self-correction
- Mistake levels L1–L4: hallucination, policy, secrets/commits, compliance
- Cross-Jurisdiction: GDPR vs CCPA vs PIPA
- Cloud / Google Workspace / DRM / KISA / Incident Response
- Collaboration: Slack Bot, Telegram Bot, team sharing, RBAC

## Tech Stack

- SKIL (YAML/JSON) + MCP + TypeScript / Node.js 22
- Next.js 15 dashboard (M3); Vercel; NextAuth
- Public LLM: Claude, GPT-4o, DeepSeek; Local: Ollama
- Scanners: Gitleaks, Trivy, Prowler, Semgrep
- Notifications: Slack Bot, Telegram Bot, Resend
- Phase 4: Wazuh SIEM via MCP

## About
